name: Carbone
reason: Iconic red-sauce Italian with impeccable service and a theatrical atmosphere that makes any team dinner feel special.

name: Xi'an Famous Foods
reason: Hand-pulled noodles and bold flavors in a casual setting — perfect for a quick, affordable team lunch.

name: Le Bernardin
reason: Three-Michelin-star seafood for a memorable celebration dinner with private dining available.

name: Los Tacos No. 1
reason: Authentic tacos in Chelsea Market — fast, delicious, and no reservations needed for group grab-and-go.

name: Russ & Daughters Cafe
reason: Iconic NYC deli experience with communal tables and classic brunch that feels quintessentially New York.

name: Thai Diner
reason: Creative Thai comfort food with shareable plates and a fun retro diner vibe perfect for team bonding.

name: Shake Shack — Madison Square Park
reason: Casual outdoor dining in the park — low-key and easy for groups of any size to grab a quick meal.

name: Gramercy Tavern
reason: Elegant farm-to-table dining with private rooms available for team dinners and a warm, welcoming atmosphere.

name: Momofuku Noodle Bar
reason: David Chang's legendary noodle spot with a communal vibe and bold flavors that spark conversation.

name: Joe's Pizza
reason: The quintessential NYC slice — a must-do team experience for anyone visiting New York.

name: Olmsted
reason: Garden-to-table dining in Prospect Heights with a beautiful backyard garden — intimate and memorable.

name: Estela
reason: Small plates meant for sharing, encouraging collaborative dining and trying new flavors together.

name: Atoboy
reason: Modern Korean prix fixe with a choose-your-own-adventure format that makes ordering a fun group activity.

name: Daily Provisions
reason: Danny Meyer's breakfast spot with excellent coffee and pastries — ideal for morning team meetups.

name: Sushi Nakazawa
reason: Omakase experience that creates a shared sense of occasion — perfect for celebrating a team milestone.
